title: Baseball Game
description: Baseball ops: number push, + pop2 sum, D double top, C pop, pop2 diff push.

solutions.c: int calPoints682(char** ops,int n){ int st[1000],top=0,i,s=0; for(i=0;i<n;i++){ if(ops[i][0]=='+') st[top]=st[top-1]+st[top-2],top++; else if(ops[i][0]=='D') st[top]=st[top-1]*2,top++; else if(ops[i][0]=='C') top--; else st[top++]=atoi(ops[i]); } for(i=0;i<top;i++) s+=st[i]; return s; }
